prompt: {argument name="subject" default="a stunning beauty with a cool, aloof atmosphere"}, delicate facial features, a cold and sophisticated high-fashion face, long hair, and a graceful slender figure; {argument name="pose" default="barbecue “three-sword style” pose"}: one barbecue skewer held in her mouth, one skewer in each hand crossed to mimic Zoro’s three-sword style; street night scene ambiance, warm yellow night market lighting, blurred background, film-like texture, soft-focus glow, cinematic storytelling feel, trendy high-end influencer-style fashion shoot, clear luminous skin, sharply detailed strands of hair, lively dynamic expression, low-angle wide-angle shot, moody dark-toned atmosphere, shallow depth of field, ultra HD 8K, extreme detail, cinematic lighting
translatedPrompt: {argument name="subject" default="一位气质清冷、令人惊艳的美人"}, 五官精致，冷艳高级的时装面孔，长发，身姿优雅纤细；{argument name="pose" default="烧烤“三刀流”姿势"}：嘴里咬着一串烤肉，双手各持一串烤肉交叉，模仿索隆的“三刀流”姿势；街头夜景氛围，暖黄色夜市灯光，背景虚化，胶片质感，柔焦光晕，电影叙事感，潮流高端网红时尚大片，皮肤通透发光，发丝细节清晰，表情生动灵动，低角度广角拍摄，暗调情绪氛围，浅景深，超高清 8K，极致细节，电影级布光

breakdown.creativeCore: 高级时装风格动漫致敬肖像：一款高级时装肖像提示词，以夜市为背景，利用烤串模仿著名的动漫剑术战斗姿势。
breakdown.subject: 服饰
breakdown.bestUse: 动漫分镜、战斗场景、运动瞬间、夸张叙事图

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 插画/漫画 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: cinematic]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: shallow depth, depth of field]。

Text requirements:
包含文字或排版元素。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
